<files>[{"path":"docs/qwen.md","content":"# Qwen Documentation

## Overview
Qwen is a series of large language models developed by Alibaba Cloud, offering advanced capabilities in natural language understanding and generation across multiple domains.

## Key Features
- Multi-modal reasoning
- Code generation and debugging
- Long-context understanding
- Cross-lingual support
